name: 沈睿

appearance.distinguishing_features: 眼神透着不符合年龄的成熟与悲伤

costume.typical_outfit: 精致但略显宽大的锦缎童装

visual_reference: A pale and sickly ancient Chinese boy around 8 years old, wearing fine but slightly loose silk clothes, mature and sad eyes, cinematic lighting.
desire: 父母和睦，母亲不再受委屈
flaw: 把父母的矛盾归咎于自己
arc: 无明显弧线，作为白月光存在

relationships.function: 解开女主心结，促使她接受女儿昭昭
